name: Pluri Inc.
summary: Pluri Inc. is a biotechnology company operating through its Israeli subsidiary Pluri Biotech Ltd. and related entities. The company develops cell-based technologies across regenerative medicine, immunotherapy, food technology, and agriculture technology (AgTech). Key products include PLX-PAD and PLX-R18 placenta-expanded cell therapies. Pluri also operates a Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) business leveraging its mass-scale, cost-effective cell expansion platform.

products.name: PLX-PAD
products.description: Placenta-expanded (PLX) cell therapy under clinical development as a potential novel treatment.

products.name: PLX-R18
products.description: Placenta-expanded cell therapy product under clinical development.

products.name: Allogeneic Placental MAIT Cells
products.description: New allogeneic placental Mucosal Associated Invariant T cell therapy targeting immune disorders and oncology.

products.name: CDMO Services
products.description: Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization services using Pluri's cell expansion platform.

partnerships.description: Provides funding/grants to support Pluri's research and development activities.
Pluri has an existing loan with EIB and is in discussions regarding its restructuring.
Source of grants supporting Pluri's research programs.
